category_sources: Official koji README says it creates conventional commits through an interactive prompt.
source_facts.description says interactive CLI for creating conventional commits.
display_name_sources: Official repository README heading is koji.
docs_sources: Official repository README documents installation, usage, git hook setup, and configuration.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/cococonscious/koji; per instruction, not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README describes koji as a replacement for git commit enforcing the Conventional Commits standard.
Official koji README topics include git, rust, cli, developer-tools, and conventional-commits.
